summary: XAI (Explainable AI) module testing completed. Fixed 1 bug in Cluster Explanation feature. All 9 XAI features tested. SHAP Analysis (5 charts), LIME Explanation (2 charts), and Cluster Explanation (2 charts) all working. Metric tooltips working. All existing features verified.

issues: AnimatePresence warning: multiple children animation - no functional impact
validateDOMNesting warning: div in p (Badge component) - minor HTML issue

passed_tests: TEST 2: Explainability tab appears in sidebar between Predictions and Data Explorer
TEST 3: When no model trained, shows 'No Model to Explain' with Go to Analysis button
TEST 4: SHAP Analysis - Global Feature Importance bar chart renders correctly
TEST 5: SHAP Analysis - Beeswarm plot renders with blue=low, pink=high coloring
TEST 6: SHAP Analysis - Waterfall Plot shows base value and prediction breakdown
TEST 7: SHAP Analysis - Dependence Plot renders with feature selector dropdown
TEST 8: SHAP Analysis - Force Plot shows positive (pink) and negative (cyan) contributions
TEST 9: LIME Explanation - Feature Contribution bar chart (green/pink colors)
TEST 10: LIME Explanation - Side-by-side SHAP vs LIME comparison card appears
TEST 11: Row selector - Changing row number updates all XAI results correctly
TEST 12: Dependence plot feature selector dropdown works
TEST 13: Unsupervised Analysis - Cluster Explanation tab appears when unsupervised results exist
TEST 14: Cluster Explanation - Cluster Feature Influence chart renders (FIXED BUG)
TEST 15: Cluster Explanation - Cluster SHAP Distribution scatter plot renders
TEST 16: Metric Tooltips - MetricTip component shows tooltip on hover (R², MAE, RMSE, Silhouette, etc.)
TEST 17: Existing features - Dashboard, Dark Mode, Model Library, Data Explorer all work

bugs_fixed.issue: Cluster Explanation was showing 'No unsupervised results' error because it was checking for unsupervisedResult.preprocessing.data which doesn't exist in the result object
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to access data from dataProfile.rows and transform using unsupervisedResult.means and stds

critical_code_review_comments: All XAI features properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
MetricTip component correctly displays tooltips for all metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, f1, r2, mae, rmse, silhouette, etc.)
SHAP and LIME computations run client-side in browser using approximation algorithms
Cluster Explanation bug was caused by missing data property in unsupervisedResult object - fixed by reconstructing data from dataProfile
seed_data_creation: Used Iris-like dataset with 24 rows (sepal_length, sepal_width, petal_length, petal_width, species)
context_for_next_testing_agent: XAI module fully tested. Key data-testids: 'xai-tabs', 'run-shap-btn', 'run-lime-btn', 'explain-prediction-btn', 'run-cluster-explain-btn', 'shap-global-importance', 'shap-beeswarm', 'shap-waterfall', 'shap-dependence', 'shap-force', 'lime-contribution', 'lime-probability', 'cluster-feature-influence', 'cluster-shap-distribution', 'xai-side-by-side', 'metric-tip-accuracy', 'metric-tip-precision', 'metric-tip-f1', 'xai-row-select', 'xai-dep-feature-select'. For cluster explanation testing, must run unsupervised analysis first (select 'No target (Unsupervised Learning)' and click 'Run Unsupervised Analysis'). Bug was fixed in handleClusterExplain function - data now correctly sourced from dataProfile.rows.
rca_of_the_issue: Cluster Explanation bug: The handleClusterExplain function was checking for unsupervisedResult?.preprocessing?.data but runUnsupervisedPipeline() returns preprocessing object without a 'data' property. The fix reconstructs the standardized data matrix from dataProfile.rows using the means and stds stored in unsupervisedResult.
